Datasets.description: A list of datasets that are defined.

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

AccountId.description: The ID of the Amazon Web Services account that owns the dataset.

CreatedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who created the dataset.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the dataset was created.

Name.description: The unique name of the dataset.

Format.description: The file format of a dataset that is created from an Amazon S3 file or folder.

FormatOptions.description: A set of options that define how DataBrew interprets the data in the dataset.

Json.description: Options that define how JSON input is to be interpreted by DataBrew.

MultiLine.description: A value that specifies whether JSON input contains embedded new line characters.

Excel.description: Options that define how Excel input is to be interpreted by DataBrew.

SheetNames.description: One or more named sheets in the Excel file that will be included in the dataset.

SheetIndexes.description: One or more sheet numbers in the Excel file that will be included in the dataset.

HeaderRow.description: A variable that specifies whether the first row in the file is parsed as the header. If this value is false, column names are auto-generated.

Csv.description: Options that define how CSV input is to be interpreted by DataBrew.

Delimiter.description: A single character that specifies the delimiter being used in the CSV file.

HeaderRow.description: A variable that specifies whether the first row in the file is parsed as the header. If this value is false, column names are auto-generated.

Input.description: Information on how DataBrew can find the dataset, in either the Glue Data Catalog or Amazon S3.

S3InputDefinition.description: The Amazon S3 location where the data is stored.

Key.description: The unique name of the object in the bucket.

BucketOwner.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID of the bucket owner.

DataCatalogInputDefinition.description: The Glue Data Catalog parameters for the data.

CatalogId.description: The unique identifier of the Amazon Web Services account that holds the Data Catalog that stores the data.

DatabaseName.description: The name of a database in the Data Catalog.

TableName.description: The name of a database table in the Data Catalog. This table corresponds to a DataBrew dataset.

TempDirectory.description: Represents an Amazon location where DataBrew can store intermediate results.

Key.description: The unique name of the object in the bucket.

BucketOwner.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID of the bucket owner.

DatabaseInputDefinition.description: Connection information for dataset input files stored in a database.

GlueConnectionName.description: The Glue Connection that stores the connection information for the target database.

TempDirectory.description: Represents an Amazon S3 location (bucket name, bucket owner, and object key) where DataBrew can read input data, or write output from a job.

Key.description: The unique name of the object in the bucket.

BucketOwner.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID of the bucket owner.

QueryString.description: Custom SQL to run against the provided Glue connection. This SQL will be used as the input for DataBrew projects and jobs.

Metadata.description: Contains additional resource information needed for specific datasets.

SourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) associated with the dataset. Currently, DataBrew only supports ARNs from Amazon AppFlow.

LastModifiedDate.description: The last modification date and time of the dataset.

LastModifiedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who last modified the dataset.

Source.description: The location of the data for the dataset, either Amazon S3 or the Glue Data Catalog.

PathOptions.description: A set of options that defines how DataBrew interprets an Amazon S3 path of the dataset.

LastModifiedDateCondition.description: If provided, this structure defines a date range for matching Amazon S3 objects based on their LastModifiedDate attribute in Amazon S3.

Expression.description: The expression which includes condition names followed by substitution variables, possibly grouped and combined with other conditions. For example, "(starts_with :prefix1 or starts_with :prefix2) and (ends_with :suffix1 or ends_with :suffix2)". Substitution variables should start with ':' symbol.

ValuesMap.description: The map of substitution variable names to their values used in this filter expression.

FilesLimit.description: If provided, this structure imposes a limit on a number of files that should be selected.

MaxFiles.description: The number of Amazon S3 files to select.

OrderedBy.description: A criteria to use for Amazon S3 files sorting before their selection. By default uses LAST_MODIFIED_DATE as a sorting criteria. Currently it's the only allowed value.

Order.description: A criteria to use for Amazon S3 files sorting before their selection. By default uses DESCENDING order, i.e. most recent files are selected first. Another possible value is ASCENDING.

Parameters.description: A structure that maps names of parameters used in the Amazon S3 path of a dataset to their definitions.

Tags.description: Metadata tags that have been applied to the dataset.

ResourceArn.description: The unique Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the dataset.

Jobs.description: A list of jobs that are defined.

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

AccountId.description: The ID of the Amazon Web Services account that owns the job.

CreatedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who created the job.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the job was created.

DatasetName.description: A dataset that the job is to process.

EncryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an encryption key that is used to protect the job output. For more information, see Encrypting data written by DataBrew jobs

EncryptionMode.description:
The encryption mode for the job, which can be one of the following:

  • SSE-KMS - Server-side encryption with keys managed by KMS.

  • SSE-S3 - Server-side encryption with keys managed by Amazon S3.

Name.description: The unique name of the job.

Type.description:
The job type of the job, which must be one of the following:

  • PROFILE - A job to analyze a dataset, to determine its size, data types, data distribution, and more.

  • RECIPE - A job to apply one or more transformations to a dataset.

LastModifiedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who last modified the job.

LastModifiedDate.description: The modification date and time of the job.

LogSubscription.description: The current status of Amazon CloudWatch logging for the job.

MaxCapacity.description: The maximum number of nodes that can be consumed when the job processes data.

MaxRetries.description: The maximum number of times to retry the job after a job run fails.

Outputs.description: One or more artifacts that represent output from running the job.

DataCatalogOutputs.description: One or more artifacts that represent the Glue Data Catalog output from running the job.

DatabaseOutputs.description: Represents a list of JDBC database output objects which defines the output destination for a DataBrew recipe job to write into.

ProjectName.description: The name of the project that the job is associated with.

RecipeReference.description: A set of steps that the job runs.

Name.description: The name of the recipe.

RecipeVersion.description: The identifier for the version for the recipe.

ResourceArn.description: The unique Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the job.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the role to be assumed for this job.

Timeout.description: The job's timeout in minutes. A job that attempts to run longer than this timeout period ends with a status of TIMEOUT.

Tags.description: Metadata tags that have been applied to the job.

JobSample.description: A sample configuration for profile jobs only, which determines the number of rows on which the profile job is run. If a JobSample value isn't provided, the default value is used. The default value is CUSTOM_ROWS for the mode parameter and 20,000 for the size parameter.

Mode.description:
A value that determines whether the profile job is run on the entire dataset or a specified number of rows. This value must be one of the following:

  • FULL_DATASET - The profile job is run on the entire dataset.

  • CUSTOM_ROWS - The profile job is run on the number of rows specified in the Size parameter.

Size.description:
The Size parameter is only required when the mode is CUSTOM_ROWS. The profile job is run on the specified number of rows. The maximum value for size is Long.MAX_VALUE.

Long.MAX_VALUE = 9223372036854775807

ValidationConfigurations.description: List of validation configurations that are applied to the profile job.

Projects.description: A list of projects that are defined .

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

AccountId.description: The ID of the Amazon Web Services account that owns the project.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the project was created.

CreatedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who crated the project.

DatasetName.description: The dataset that the project is to act upon.

LastModifiedDate.description: The last modification date and time for the project.

LastModifiedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who last modified the project.

Name.description: The unique name of a project.

RecipeName.description: The name of a recipe that will be developed during a project session.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the project.

Sample.description: The sample size and sampling type to apply to the data. If this parameter isn't specified, then the sample consists of the first 500 rows from the dataset.

Size.description: The number of rows in the sample.

Type.description: The way in which DataBrew obtains rows from a dataset.

Tags.description: Metadata tags that have been applied to the project.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the role that will be assumed for this project.

OpenedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user that opened the project for use.

OpenDate.description: The date and time when the project was opened.

Recipes.description: A list of recipes that are defined.

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

CreatedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who created the recipe.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the recipe was created.

LastModifiedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who last modified the recipe.

LastModifiedDate.description: The last modification date and time of the recipe.

ProjectName.description: The name of the project that the recipe is associated with.

PublishedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who published the recipe.

PublishedDate.description: The date and time when the recipe was published.

Name.description: The unique name for the recipe.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the recipe.

Steps.description: A list of steps that are defined by the recipe.

Tags.description: Metadata tags that have been applied to the recipe.

RecipeVersion.description:
The identifier for the version for the recipe. Must be one of the following:

  • Numeric version (X.Y) - X and Y stand for major and minor version numbers. The maximum length of each is 6 digits, and neither can be negative values. Both X and Y are required, and "0.0" isn't a valid version.

  • LATEST_WORKING - the most recent valid version being developed in a DataBrew project.

  • LATEST_PUBLISHED - the most recent published version.

Rulesets.description: A list of RulesetItem. RulesetItem contains meta data of a ruleset.

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

AccountId.description: The ID of the Amazon Web Services account that owns the ruleset.

CreatedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who created the ruleset.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the ruleset was created.

LastModifiedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who last modified the ruleset.

LastModifiedDate.description: The modification date and time of the ruleset.

Name.description: The name of the ruleset.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the ruleset.

RuleCount.description: The number of rules that are defined in the ruleset.

Tags.description: Metadata tags that have been applied to the ruleset.

TargetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of a resource (dataset) that the ruleset is associated with.

Schedules.description: A list of schedules that are defined.

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

AccountId.description: The ID of the Amazon Web Services account that owns the schedule.

CreatedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who created the schedule.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the schedule was created.

JobNames.description: A list of jobs to be run, according to the schedule.

LastModifiedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who last modified the schedule.

LastModifiedDate.description: The date and time when the schedule was last modified.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the schedule.

CronExpression.description: The dates and times when the job is to run. For more information, see Cron expressions in the Glue DataBrew Developer Guide.

Tags.description: Metadata tags that have been applied to the schedule.

Name.description: The name of the schedule.
The name of the recipe that was modified.

Errors.description: Errors, if any, that occurred while attempting to delete the recipe versions.

ErrorCode.description: The HTTP status code for the error.

RecipeVersion.description: The identifier for the recipe version associated with this error.

Name.description: The name of the dataset that you created.
The name of the job that was created.
The name of the project that you created.
The name of the recipe that you created.
The name of the job that you created.
The unique name of the created ruleset.
The name of the schedule that was created.
The name of the dataset that you deleted.
The name of the job that you deleted.
The name of the project that you deleted.
The name of the recipe that was deleted.

RecipeVersion.description: The version of the recipe that was deleted.

Name.description: The name of the deleted ruleset.
The name of the schedule that was deleted.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who created the dataset.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the dataset was created.

Name.description: The name of the dataset.

Format.description: The file format of a dataset that is created from an Amazon S3 file or folder.

FormatOptions.description: Represents a set of options that define the structure of either comma-separated value (CSV), Excel, or JSON input.

Input.description: Represents information on how DataBrew can find data, in either the Glue Data Catalog or Amazon S3.

LastModifiedDate.description: The date and time that the dataset was last modified.

LastModifiedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who last modified the dataset.

Source.description: The location of the data for this dataset, Amazon S3 or the Glue Data Catalog.

PathOptions.description: A set of options that defines how DataBrew interprets an Amazon S3 path of the dataset.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset.

Json.description: Options that define how JSON input is to be interpreted by DataBrew.

MultiLine.description: A value that specifies whether JSON input contains embedded new line characters.

Excel.description: Options that define how Excel input is to be interpreted by DataBrew.

SheetNames.description: One or more named sheets in the Excel file that will be included in the dataset.

SheetIndexes.description: One or more sheet numbers in the Excel file that will be included in the dataset.

HeaderRow.description: A variable that specifies whether the first row in the file is parsed as the header. If this value is false, column names are auto-generated.

Csv.description: Options that define how CSV input is to be interpreted by DataBrew.

Delimiter.description: A single character that specifies the delimiter being used in the CSV file.

HeaderRow.description: A variable that specifies whether the first row in the file is parsed as the header. If this value is false, column names are auto-generated.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the job was created.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user associated with the creation of the job.

DatasetName.description: The dataset that the job acts upon.

EncryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an encryption key that is used to protect the job.

EncryptionMode.description:
The encryption mode for the job, which can be one of the following:

  • SSE-KMS - Server-side encryption with keys managed by KMS.

  • SSE-S3 - Server-side encryption with keys managed by Amazon S3.

Name.description: The name of the job.

Type.description:
The job type, which must be one of the following:

  • PROFILE - The job analyzes the dataset to determine its size, data types, data distribution, and more.

  • RECIPE - The job applies one or more transformations to a dataset.

LastModifiedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who last modified the job.

LastModifiedDate.description: The date and time that the job was last modified.

LogSubscription.description: Indicates whether Amazon CloudWatch logging is enabled for this job.

MaxCapacity.description: The maximum number of compute nodes that DataBrew can consume when the job processes data.

MaxRetries.description: The maximum number of times to retry the job after a job run fails.

Outputs.description: One or more artifacts that represent the output from running the job.

DataCatalogOutputs.description: One or more artifacts that represent the Glue Data Catalog output from running the job.

DatabaseOutputs.description: Represents a list of JDBC database output objects which defines the output destination for a DataBrew recipe job to write into.

ProjectName.description: The DataBrew project associated with this job.

ProfileConfiguration.description: Configuration for profile jobs. Used to select columns, do evaluations, and override default parameters of evaluations. When configuration is null, the profile job will run with default settings.

ValidationConfigurations.description: List of validation configurations that are applied to the profile job.

RecipeReference.description: Represents the name and version of a DataBrew recipe.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the job.

RoleArn.description: The ARN of the Identity and Access Management (IAM) role to be assumed when DataBrew runs the job.

Timeout.description: The job's timeout in minutes. A job that attempts to run longer than this timeout period ends with a status of TIMEOUT.

JobSample.description: Sample configuration for profile jobs only. Determines the number of rows on which the profile job will be executed.

CompressionFormat.description: The compression algorithm used to compress the output text of the job.

Format.description: The data format of the output of the job.

PartitionColumns.description: The names of one or more partition columns for the output of the job.

Location.description: The location in Amazon S3 where the job writes its output.

Key.description: The unique name of the object in the bucket.

BucketOwner.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID of the bucket owner.

Overwrite.description: A value that, if true, means that any data in the location specified for output is overwritten with new output.

FormatOptions.description: Represents options that define how DataBrew formats job output files.

Csv.description: Represents a set of options that define the structure of comma-separated value (CSV) job output.

Delimiter.description: A single character that specifies the delimiter used to create CSV job output.

MaxOutputFiles.description: Maximum number of files to be generated by the job and written to the output folder. For output partitioned by column(s), the MaxOutputFiles value is the maximum number of files per partition.

Attempt.description: The number of times that DataBrew has attempted to run the job.

CompletedOn.description: The date and time when the job completed processing.

DatasetName.description: The name of the dataset for the job to process.

ErrorMessage.description: A message indicating an error (if any) that was encountered when the job ran.

ExecutionTime.description: The amount of time, in seconds, during which the job run consumed resources.

JobName.description: The name of the job being processed during this run.

ProfileConfiguration.description: Configuration for profile jobs. Used to select columns, do evaluations, and override default parameters of evaluations. When configuration is null, the profile job will run with default settings.

ValidationConfigurations.description: List of validation configurations that are applied to the profile job.

RunId.description: The unique identifier of the job run.

State.description: The current state of the job run entity itself.

LogSubscription.description: The current status of Amazon CloudWatch logging for the job run.

LogGroupName.description: The name of an Amazon CloudWatch log group, where the job writes diagnostic messages when it runs.

Outputs.description: One or more output artifacts from a job run.

DataCatalogOutputs.description: One or more artifacts that represent the Glue Data Catalog output from running the job.

DatabaseOutputs.description: Represents a list of JDBC database output objects which defines the output destination for a DataBrew recipe job to write into.

RecipeReference.description: Represents the name and version of a DataBrew recipe.

StartedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who started the job run.

StartedOn.description: The date and time when the job run began.

JobSample.description: Sample configuration for profile jobs only. Determines the number of rows on which the profile job will be executed. If a JobSample value is not provided, the default value will be used. The default value is CUSTOM_ROWS for the mode parameter and 20000 for the size parameter.

RulesetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the ruleset to be validated in the profile job. The TargetArn of the selected ruleset should be the same as the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset that is associated with the profile job.

ValidationMode.description: Mode of data quality validation. Default mode is “CHECK_ALL” which verifies all rules defined in the selected ruleset.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the project was created.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who created the project.

LastModifiedDate.description: The date and time that the project was last modified.

LastModifiedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who last modified the project.

Name.description: The name of the project.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the project.

Sample.description: Represents the sample size and sampling type for DataBrew to use for interactive data analysis.

RoleArn.description: The ARN of the Identity and Access Management (IAM) role to be assumed when DataBrew runs the job.

SessionStatus.description:
Describes the current state of the session:

  • PROVISIONING - allocating resources for the session.

  • INITIALIZING - getting the session ready for first use.

  • ASSIGNED - the session is ready for use.

OpenedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user that opened the project for use.

OpenDate.description: The date and time when the project was opened.

Size.description: The number of rows in the sample.

Type.description: The way in which DataBrew obtains rows from a dataset.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who created the recipe.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the recipe was created.

LastModifiedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who last modified the recipe.

LastModifiedDate.description: The date and time that the recipe was last modified.

ProjectName.description: The name of the project associated with this recipe.

PublishedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who last published the recipe.

PublishedDate.description: The date and time when the recipe was last published.

Name.description: The name of the recipe.

Steps.description: One or more steps to be performed by the recipe. Each step consists of an action, and the conditions under which the action should succeed.

Action.description: The particular action to be performed in the recipe step.

Operation.description: The name of a valid DataBrew transformation to be performed on the data.

ConditionExpressions.description:
One or more conditions that must be met for the recipe step to succeed.

All of the conditions in the array must be met. In other words, all of the conditions must be combined using a logical AND operation.

Name.description: The name of the ruleset.

TargetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of a resource (dataset) that the ruleset is associated with.

Rules.description: A list of rules that are defined with the ruleset. A rule includes one or more checks to be validated on a DataBrew dataset.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the ruleset was created.

CreatedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who created the ruleset.

LastModifiedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who last modified the ruleset.

LastModifiedDate.description: The modification date and time of the ruleset.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the ruleset.

Tags.description: Metadata tags that have been applied to the ruleset.

Name.description: The name of the rule.

Disabled.description: A value that specifies whether the rule is disabled. Once a rule is disabled, a profile job will not validate it during a job run. Default value is false.

CheckExpression.description:
The expression which includes column references, condition names followed by variable references, possibly grouped and combined with other conditions. For example, (:col1 starts_with :prefix1 or :col1 starts_with :prefix2) and (:col1 ends_with :suffix1 or :col1 ends_with :suffix2). Column and value references are substitution variables that should start with the ':' symbol. Depending on the context, substitution variables' values can be either an actual value or a column name. These values are defined in the SubstitutionMap. If a CheckExpression starts with a column reference, then ColumnSelectors in the rule should be null. If ColumnSelectors has been defined, then there should be no column reference in the left side of a condition, for example, is_between :val1 and :val2.

For more information, see Available checks

SubstitutionMap.description: The map of substitution variable names to their values used in a check expression. Variable names should start with a ':' (colon). Variable values can either be actual values or column names. To differentiate between the two, column names should be enclosed in backticks, for example, ":col1": "`Column A`".

Threshold.description: The threshold used with a non-aggregate check expression. Non-aggregate check expressions will be applied to each row in a specific column, and the threshold will be used to determine whether the validation succeeds.

Type.description: The type of a threshold. Used for comparison of an actual count of rows that satisfy the rule to the threshold value.

Unit.description: Unit of threshold value. Can be either a COUNT or PERCENTAGE of the full sample size used for validation.

ColumnSelectors.description: List of column selectors. Selectors can be used to select columns using a name or regular expression from the dataset. Rule will be applied to selected columns.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the schedule was created.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who created the schedule.

JobNames.description: The name or names of one or more jobs to be run by using the schedule.

LastModifiedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who last modified the schedule.

LastModifiedDate.description: The date and time that the schedule was last modified.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the schedule.

CronExpression.description: The date or dates and time or times when the jobs are to be run for the schedule. For more information, see Cron expressions in the Glue DataBrew Developer Guide.

Name.description: The name of the schedule.

JobRuns.description: A list of job runs that have occurred for the specified job.

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

Attempt.description: The number of times that DataBrew has attempted to run the job.

CompletedOn.description: The date and time when the job completed processing.

DatasetName.description: The name of the dataset for the job to process.

ErrorMessage.description: A message indicating an error (if any) that was encountered when the job ran.

ExecutionTime.description: The amount of time, in seconds, during which a job run consumed resources.

JobName.description: The name of the job being processed during this run.

RunId.description: The unique identifier of the job run.

State.description: The current state of the job run entity itself.

LogSubscription.description: The current status of Amazon CloudWatch logging for the job run.

LogGroupName.description: The name of an Amazon CloudWatch log group, where the job writes diagnostic messages when it runs.

Outputs.description: One or more output artifacts from a job run.

DataCatalogOutputs.description: One or more artifacts that represent the Glue Data Catalog output from running the job.

DatabaseOutputs.description: Represents a list of JDBC database output objects which defines the output destination for a DataBrew recipe job to write into.

RecipeReference.description: The set of steps processed by the job.

Name.description: The name of the recipe.

RecipeVersion.description: The identifier for the version for the recipe.

StartedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who initiated the job run.

StartedOn.description: The date and time when the job run began.

JobSample.description: A sample configuration for profile jobs only, which determines the number of rows on which the profile job is run. If a JobSample value isn't provided, the default is used. The default value is CUSTOM_ROWS for the mode parameter and 20,000 for the size parameter.

Mode.description:
A value that determines whether the profile job is run on the entire dataset or a specified number of rows. This value must be one of the following:

  • FULL_DATASET - The profile job is run on the entire dataset.

  • CUSTOM_ROWS - The profile job is run on the number of rows specified in the Size parameter.

Size.description:
The Size parameter is only required when the mode is CUSTOM_ROWS. The profile job is run on the specified number of rows. The maximum value for size is Long.MAX_VALUE.

Long.MAX_VALUE = 9223372036854775807

ValidationConfigurations.description: List of validation configurations that are applied to the profile job run.

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

Recipes.description: A list of versions for the specified recipe.

CreatedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who created the recipe.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the recipe was created.

LastModifiedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who last modified the recipe.

LastModifiedDate.description: The last modification date and time of the recipe.

ProjectName.description: The name of the project that the recipe is associated with.

PublishedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who published the recipe.

PublishedDate.description: The date and time when the recipe was published.

Name.description: The unique name for the recipe.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the recipe.

Steps.description: A list of steps that are defined by the recipe.

Tags.description: Metadata tags that have been applied to the recipe.

RecipeVersion.description:
The identifier for the version for the recipe. Must be one of the following:

  • Numeric version (X.Y) - X and Y stand for major and minor version numbers. The maximum length of each is 6 digits, and neither can be negative values. Both X and Y are required, and "0.0" isn't a valid version.

  • LATEST_WORKING - the most recent valid version being developed in a DataBrew project.

  • LATEST_PUBLISHED - the most recent published version.

Tags.description: A list of tags associated with the DataBrew resource.

Name.description: The name of the recipe that you published.

Result.description: A message indicating the result of performing the action.

Name.description: The name of the project that was affected by the action.

ActionId.description: A unique identifier for the action that was performed.

RunId.description: A system-generated identifier for this particular job run.

Name.description: The name of the project to be acted upon.

RunId.description: The ID of the job run that you stopped.

Name.description: The name of the dataset that you updated.
